blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned about the value of Synthetic Monitoring for proactive blackbox monitoring
- Navigated to Synthetic Monitoring in Grafana Cloud
- Initialized the Synthetic Monitoring plugin for your account
- Created your first ping check to test endpoint reachability
- Selected global probe locations to monitor from multiple regions
- Explored the check dashboard with uptime, latency, and reachability metrics
- Explored the time point explorer to analyze individual check executions

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can:

- [Create HTTP checks](/docs/grafana-cloud/testing/synthetic-monitoring/create-checks/checks/http/)
- [Create k6 scripted checks](/docs/grafana-cloud/testing/synthetic-monitoring/create-checks/checks/k6/)
- [Configure Synthetic Monitoring alerts](/docs/grafana-cloud/testing/synthetic-monitoring/configure-alerts/)
- [Set up private probes](/docs/grafana-cloud/testing/synthetic-monitoring/set-up/set-up-private-probes/)
